specs.title: cp-000: Search-tab identifier-detection banner is a full-width button rather than passiv
cp-001: Identifier-detection banner label is Resolve DOI or Resolve PMID followed by the
cp-002: Search-tab ArrowDown moves the focused search row down by one and clamps at the
cp-003: Search-tab ArrowUp moves the focused search row up by one and clamps at zero
cp-004: Search-tab Enter resolves the typed identifier when DOIPMID detection is active
cp-005: Search-tab Enter toggles the currently focused reference row when DOIPMID detect
cp-006: Search-tab merges local references and PubMed results without duplicate ids
cp-007: Search-tab selected rows show a blue checkbox state
cp-008: Search-tab already-numbered references show a right-side numeric badge like 3
cp-009: Library-tab data loads lazily on first switch to the library tab
cp-010: First library-tab load searches the saved papers library with an empty string
cp-011: Library-tab search input placeholder is Search your saved papers
cp-012: Library-tab search waits 300 ms after typing before calling searchPapersInLibrar
cp-013: Library-tab loading state is a centered spinner row
cp-014: Library-tab empty state text is No papers match your search when a filter query
cp-015: Library-tab empty state text is No papers in your library yet Save papers from t
cp-016: Library-tab paper rows show title plus authorjournalyear summary text
cp-017: Library-tab added papers are converted to references with ids ref-paper-paperid
cp-018: Clicking a library paper that is already in references toggles selection instead
cp-019: Library-tab non-selected already-added papers show helper text Already in refere
cp-020: Resolving an identifier switches the active tab to doi
cp-021: DOI-tab label text is Paste DOI or PMID
cp-022: DOI-tab input placeholder is 101056NEJMoa2301234 or 37654789
cp-023: DOI-tab Resolve button is disabled when the input is blank
cp-024: DOI-tab Resolve button is also disabled while doiLoading is true
cp-025: DOI-tab pressing Enter with a non-empty input triggers resolution
cp-026: DOI-tab error panel includes a secondary action text Try manual entry
cp-027: Clicking Try manual entry switches the active tab to manual
cp-028: Successful DOIPMID resolution shows a green preview card with title and condense
cp-029: DOI preview action label is Add to References
cp-030: Adding a resolved reference returns the dialog to the search tab
cp-031: Manual-entry Type select defaults to Article
cp-032: Manual-entry type options are Article Book Book Chapter Website Guideline Confer
cp-033: Manual-entry title label includes a required asterisk in Title
cp-034: Manual-entry title placeholder is Article title
